prompt: Write a poem about the stars
last_output: The stars above make me feel happy as they twinkle in the darkness. These large celestial bodies burn with incredible intensity across the vast universe. Light travels at quick speeds to reach our eyes from distant suns. When night begins to start, the stellar display becomes visible to observers. It can be hard to comprehend the immense distances between these glowing orbs. Each tiny point of light represents a massive star burning billions of miles away. Ancient astronomers were clever to map constellations and track their seasonal movements. As dawn approaches, the stellar show will end until darkness returns again.

prompt: Draft a poem about morning coffee
last_output: The aroma of freshly brewed coffee makes me feel happy every morning. Steam rises from my large ceramic mug in graceful spirals. I take a quick sip and feel the warmth spread through me. The caffeine begins to start working its magic on my sleepy mind. The bitter taste reminds me why mornings can be so hard sometimes. I cradle the small cup between my palms for comfort and warmth. Coffee is such a clever invention that transforms grumpy people into humans. As my morning ritual comes to an end, I'm ready to face the day.
